purpose: Deterministic capability tick: runs the slug's `tickScript:` (declared in the capability profile), parses next-state from its stdout, persists. No agent.

force.description: Accepted for parity with `capability-tick`. Scripted ticks have no agent-side schedule guard to bypass. Forwarded to the script via env if it cares.

success: capability-tick-scripted completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: capability-tick-scripted cannot return a valid canonical result
